title: TechSoup Membership
description: TechSoup Membership provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, cloud credits, communications tools, productivity tools, security tools, nonprofit consulting under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Access to donated and discounted technology and services from TechSoup's nonprofit partner network.
